item.title: We must loudly and vocally condemn this action and differentiate clearly ourselves from them and the openly antisemetic Zionists...
item.description:
We must loudly and vocally condemn this action and differentiate clearly ourselves from them and the openly antisemetic Zionists (those who profit off of the proliferation of antisemitism through the foundation and maintenance of a genocidal ethnostate)



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: There is this general trend of using your partner or your idealised self to self regulate you with traditional values and it is ...
item.description:
There is this general trend of using your partner or your idealised self to self regulate you with traditional values and it is really gross and it is really dangerous. It is not just that you shouldn’t have, but it is that people describing those aims for you or setting them in a unfalsifiable way is really dangerous#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: A much better use of time by the way would be going to one of the land sales in New York of Palestinian land, those things actua...
item.description:
A much better use of time by the way would be going to one of the land sales in New York of Palestinian land, those things actually do expose some very specific information that would genuinely be very helpful#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: There is no such thing as defensive weaponry, there is aiding and abetting war crimes and there is not doing so
item.description:
There is no such thing as defensive weaponry, there is aiding and abetting war crimes and there is not doing so.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: they cannot admit the enemy is strong because they are not willing to do that which it takes to undermine a strong enemy and rat...
item.description:
they cannot admit the enemy is strong because they are not willing to do that which it takes to undermine a strong enemy and rather they do not want to give arms to the people that could actually do it because as soon as the liberals take power the exact same criticisms will go against them
